chapter_title.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Walid Ibn Subayh

text: و ما كان فيه عن الوليد بن صبيح فقد رويته عن أبي- رضي اللّه عنه- عن عليّ بن إبراهيم، عن أبيه، عن حمّاد بن عيسى، عن الحسين بن المختار، عن الوليد ابن صبيح‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Walid ibn Subayh has been transmitted by me from my father - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Ali ibn Ibrahim, from his father, from Hammad ibn Isa, from Al-Husayn ibn Al-Mukhtar, from Al-Walid ibn Subayh.
